speaker: speaker2
text: I need you to help me .

speaker: speaker1
text: What can I do for you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I am looking for an article in a newspaper .

speaker: speaker2
text: I didn ’ t even bother to think of that .

speaker: speaker1
text: I ’ ll show you where to find your article .

speaker: speaker2
text: I get lost in this library .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thanks a lot for your help .
